message:
test(stress): add concurrent extension memory profiling and stress tests (bd-3dxz)

Add 918-line stress test suite that validates memory stability and event
dispatch latency under concurrent extension load, addressing bd-3dxz
(memory profiling and 1-hour stress test with 10+ concurrent extensions):

tests/extensions_stress.rs:
- Loads 10+ extensions simultaneously via JsExtensionRuntimeHandle
- Fires events (session:start, tool:pre, tool:post) at controlled rate
- Monitors RSS memory via sysinfo crate, tracking peak/baseline/delta
- Measures event dispatch latency with percentile reporting (p50/p95/p99)
- Generates structured JSONL report with timing, memory, and per-extension
  metrics
- Short CI variant (30s) for gating; full 1-hour variant available via
  cargo run --bin ext_stress for manual profiling sessions
- Uses TestHarness and common test infrastructure for consistent logging

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
